title: tithonia longiradiata
intro: Tithonia longiradiata, also known as Mexican sunflower or tree marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tithonia longiradiata include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Tithonia longiradiata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
